problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
